'''jazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:justiceward|justiceward]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:justiceward|justiceward]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jazhate|jazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jazhatesher|jazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazhatesherĂ«m|jazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jazhatero|jazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jazhateshĂ«|jazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazhateshĂ«m|jazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijazhatero|gokijazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijazhateshĂ«|gokijazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijazhateshĂ«m|gokijazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojazhankerom|gojazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojazhankeshĂ«|gojazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojazhankeshĂ«m|gojazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojazhankeya|gojazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jazhaterom|jazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazhatemu|jazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jazhateya|jazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijazhaterom|gokijazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijazhatemu|gokijazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijazhateya|gokijazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jazhazhate|jazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jazhazhatesher|jazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazhazhatesherĂ«m|jazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jazhazhatero|jazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jazhazhateshĂ«|jazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazhazhateshĂ«m|jazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijazhazhatero|gokijazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijazhazhateshĂ«|gokijazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijazhazhateshĂ«m|gokijazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojazhazhankerom|gojazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojazhazhankeshĂ«|gojazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojazhazhankeshĂ«m|gojazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojazhazhankeya|gojazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jazhazhaterom|jazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazhazhatemu|jazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jazhazhateya|jazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijazhazhaterom|gokijazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijazhazhatemu|gokijazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijazhazhateya|gokijazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠzhĂŠte|jĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠzhĂŠtesher|jĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠzhĂŠtero|jĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokijĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠzhĂŠterom|jĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠzhĂŠtemu|jĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠzhĂŠteya|jĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokijĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokijĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafzhafte|jafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafzhaftesher|jafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafzhaftesherĂ«m|jafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafzhaftero|jafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafzhafteshĂ«|jafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafzhafteshĂ«m|jafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafzhaftero|gokijafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafzhafteshĂ«|gokijafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafzhafteshĂ«m|gokijafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafzhafnkerom|gojafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafzhafnkeshĂ«|gojafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafzhafnkeshĂ«m|gojafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafzhafnkeya|gojafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafzhafterom|jafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafzhaftemu|jafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafzhafteya|jafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafzhafterom|gokijafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafzhaftemu|gokijafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafzhafteya|gokijafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
